mapper.sql: select opportunity_id, park_id, customer_id, opportunity_no, enterprise_name, credit_code, establish_date, registered_capital, enterprise_type, industry_type, business_scope, registered_address, equity_structure, organization_structure, main_business, last_year_revenue, major_clients, major_illegal_flag, dishonest_flag, industry_penalty_flag, carrier_types, intent_area, usage_purpose, lease_term_years, lease_term_label, decoration_requirement, supporting_needs, contact_name, contact_phone, contact_email, contact_address, id_card_files, contact_position, channel, third_party_channel_name, follow_user, follow_user_id, opportunity_status, remark, approval_project_id, submitted_audit_flag, tenant_entry_process_ins_id, tenant_entry_status, tenant_entry_current_node, tenant_entry_approval_pdf_url, tenant_entry_approval_time, last_follow_time, next_follow_time, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from biz_business_opportunity
mapper.select: order by create_time desc, opportunity_id desc
order by create_time desc, opportunity_id desc

select count(1) as totalCount, sum(case when opportunity_status in ('DRAFT', 'AUDIT', 'LEAD', 'INITIAL', 'DEEP') then 1 else 0 end) as followCount, sum(case when opportunity_status = 'DEAL' then 1 else 0 end) as dealCount, sum(case when opportunity_status = 'LOST' then 1 else 0 end) as lostCount from biz_business_opportunity where del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into biz_business_opportunity ( park_id, customer_id, opportunity_no, enterprise_name, credit_code, establish_date, registered_capital, enterprise_type, industry_type, business_scope, registered_address, equity_structure, organization_structure, main_business, last_year_revenue, major_clients, major_illegal_flag, dishonest_flag, industry_penalty_flag, carrier_types, intent_area, usage_purpose, lease_term_years, lease_term_label, decoration_requirement, supporting_needs, contact_name, contact_phone, contact_email, contact_address, id_card_files, contact_position, channel, third_party_channel_name, follow_user, follow_user_id, opportunity_status, remark, approval_project_id, submitted_audit_flag, tenant_entry_process_ins_id, tenant_entry_status, tenant_entry_current_node, tenant_entry_approval_pdf_url, tenant_entry_approval_time, last_follow_time, next_follow_time, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) values ( #{parkId}, #{customerId}, #{opportunityNo}, #{enterpriseName}, #{creditCode}, #{establishDate}, #{registeredCapital}, #{enterpriseType}, #{industryType}, #{businessScope}, #{registeredAddress}, #{equityStructure}, #{organizationStructure}, #{mainBusiness}, #{lastYearRevenue}, #{majorClients}, #{majorIllegalFlag}, #{dishonestFlag}, #{industryPenaltyFlag}, #{carrierTypes}, #{intentArea}, #{usagePurpose}, #{leaseTermYears}, #{leaseTermLabel}, #{decorationRequirement}, #{supportingNeeds}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{contactEmail}, #{contactAddress}, #{idCardFiles}, #{contactPosition}, #{channel}, #{thirdPartyChannelName}, #{followUser}, #{followUserId}, #{opportunityStatus}, #{remark}, #{approvalProjectId}, #{submittedAuditFlag}, #{tenantEntryProcessInsId}, #{tenantEntryStatus}, #{tenantEntryCurrentNode}, #{tenantEntryApprovalPdfUrl}, #{tenantEntryApprovalTime}, #{lastFollowTime}, #{nextFollowTime}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.update:
update biz_business_opportunity set del_flag = '1' where opportunity_id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select opportunity_no from biz_business_opportunity where opportunity_no like concat('SJ-', #{datePrefix}, '-%') order by opportunity_no desc limit 1

select follow_id, opportunity_id, follow_time, follow_user, follow_user_id, opportunity_status, follow_content, next_follow_time, create_by, create_time from biz_business_opportunity_follow where opportunity_id = #{opportunityId} order by follow_time desc, follow_id desc
select file_id, opportunity_id, file_name, file_url, file_suffix, file_size, create_by, create_time from biz_business_opportunity_file where opportunity_id = #{opportunityId} order by file_id desc
select customer_id from biz_customer where customer_id = #{customerId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
select customer_id from biz_customer where credit_code = #{creditCode} and del_flag = '0' order by customer_id asc limit 1
select count(1) from information_schema.tables where table_schema = database() and table_name = #{tableName}

select project_id from biz_approval_project where business_type = 'tenant_entry' and business_id = #{opportunityId} and del_flag = '0' order by case when process_status = '1' then 0 else 1 end, project_id desc limit 1

select node_name as nodeName, approver_login as approverLogin from biz_approval_node where flow_id = #{flowId} and coalesce(node_type, 'approve') not in ('submit', 'cc') and approver_login is not null and approver_login != '' order by node_order asc, node_id asc
select node_config from biz_approval_flow where flow_id = #{flowId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into biz_approval_project ( park_id, customer_id, flow_id, business_type, business_id, project_name, enterprise_name, credit_code, applicant, applicant_time, shareholder_info, business_scope, responsible_person, contact_phone, lease_floor, lease_area, rent_price, summary, approval_matter, process_status, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{opportunity.parkId}, #{opportunity.customerId}, #{flowId}, 'tenant_entry', #{opportunity.opportunityId}, concat(#{opportunity.enterpriseName}, ' 入驻审核'), #{opportunity.enterpriseName}, #{opportunity.creditCode}, #{loginName}, now(), coalesce(#{opportunity.equityStructure}, #{opportunity.enterpriseType}), #{opportunity.businessScope}, #{opportunity.contactName}, #{opportunity.contactPhone}, #{opportunity.carrierTypes}, #{opportunity.intentArea}, null, coalesce(#{opportunity.remark}, #{opportunity.businessScope}), coalesce(#{opportunity.remark}, concat(#{opportunity.enterpriseName}, ' 入驻审批申请')), '0', #{loginName}, now() )
mapper.update: update biz_approval_project set process_status = '1', current_node = coalesce(#{currentNode}, #{loginName}), current_node_name = coalesce(#{currentNodeName}, '经办人提交'), update_by = #{loginName}, update_time = now() where project_id = #{projectId}

update biz_business_opportunity
tenant_entry_process_ins_id = #{processInsId}, tenant_entry_status = #{status}, tenant_entry_current_node = #{currentNode}, tenant_entry_approval_pdf_url = #{approvalPdfUrl}, tenant_entry_approval_time = #{approvalTime}, submitted_audit_flag = #{submittedAuditFlag}, opportunity_status = #{opportunityStatus}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now()
where opportunity_id = #{opportunityId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into biz_approval_log ( park_id, project_id, flow_id, node_name, node_type, action_type, operator_name, opinion, result_status, operate_time, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{opportunity.parkId}, #{projectId}, #{flowId}, '经办人提交', 'submit', 'SUBMIT', #{loginName}, '提交审批', '已提交', now(), #{loginName}, now() )
